step_rationale: Lipid species implicated in atherosclerotic plaque biology and ACS risk stratification.
mechanism: Ceramide accumulation in atherosclerotic plaques associates with ACS susceptibility and stenosis severity.

references.title: Prognostic Value of Ceramide Dynamics in Patients with Acute Coronary Syndrome.

references.title: Association between ceramides and coronary artery stenosis in patients with coronary artery disease.
